data.en: The blue whale is the largest and heaviest animal in the world.
data.cn: 蓝鲸是世界上最大、最重的动物。
data.hint: 使用最高级比较级形容词 largest 和 heaviest。
accept: The blue whale is the heaviest and largest animal in the world.

data.en: The cheetah runs the fastest among all land animals.
data.cn: 猎豹在所有陆地动物中跑得最快。
data.hint: runs the fastest (跑得最快) 表示副词最高级。

data.en: Which animal jumps the highest, the lion, the monkey, or the tree frog?
data.cn: 狮子、猴子和树蛙，哪种动物跳得最高？
data.hint: 使用特殊疑问词 Which 引导选择问句，jumps the highest 表示跳得最高。
accept: Which animal jumps the highest, the monkey, the lion, or the tree frog?
Which animal jumps the highest, the tree frog, the monkey, or the lion?

data.en: I think it is the most beautiful animal in the world.
data.cn: 我认为它是世界上最美丽的动物。
data.hint: I think 引导宾语从句，the most beautiful 是多音节形容词的最高级形式。
accept: It is the most beautiful animal in the world, I think.

data.en: I hope I can see some one day.
data.cn: 我希望有一天我能看到一些（红杉树）。
data.hint: I hope 引导宾语从句，one day 表示“有一天”。
accept: I hope one day I can see some.

data.en: The biggest land animal in the world is the African elephant.
data.cn: 世界上最大的陆地动物是非洲象。
data.hint: African elephant 意为“非洲象”，biggest 是最高级形式。
accept: The African elephant is the biggest land animal in the world.

data.en: Among all animals, I love pandas the best.
data.cn: 在所有动物中，我最喜欢熊猫。
data.hint: Among all animals (在所有动物中) 作状语，love... the best 表示最喜欢。
accept: I love pandas the best among all animals.

data.en: I think they are the cutest animals in the world.
data.cn: 我认为它们是世界上最可爱的动物。
data.hint: cutest 是 cute 的最高级形式。
accept: They are the cutest animals in the world, I think.

data.en: The elephant birds were the largest and heaviest birds ever on earth.
data.cn: 象鸟是地球上有史以来最大、最重的鸟类。
data.hint: were were (过去式)，ever on earth (地球上有史以来)。
accept: The elephant birds were the heaviest and largest birds ever on earth.

data.en: Some could stand up to three metres tall and weigh up to 860 kg.
data.cn: 有些可以站立高达三米，重达860千克。
data.hint: could表示过去的能力，up to表示“高达/多达”。
accept: Some could stand up to three metres tall and weigh up to 860 kilograms.

data.en: The redwood tree is the tallest tree in the world.
data.cn: 红杉树是世界上最高的树。
data.hint: tallest 是形容词最高级，in the world 表示范围。

data.en: Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects in Chinese paintings.
data.cn: 竹子是中国画中最受欢迎的题材之一。
data.hint: one of the + 最高级 + 复数名词 (subjects)。

data.en: It is a symbol of goodness in Chinese culture.
data.cn: 它是中国文化中善良和美德的象征。
data.hint: a symbol of goodness (美德的象征)。

data.en: Bamboo is one of the fastest-growing plants.
data.cn: 竹子是生长最快的植物之一。
data.hint: fastest-growing 是复合形容词的最高级形式。

data.en: Some bamboo can grow almost one metre in one day.
data.cn: 有些竹子在一天内可以生长近一米。
data.hint: can grow (能生长)，almost (几乎，差不多)。

data.en: Also, it is one of the most useful plants in the world.
data.cn: 此外，它是世界上最实用的植物之一。
data.hint: one of the most useful (最实用的之一)。
accept: It is also one of the most useful plants in the world.

data.en: People can use it to build houses and make tools and instruments.
data.cn: 人们可以用它来盖房子，制作工具和乐器。
data.hint: use sth to do sth (使用某物做某事)。
accept: People can use it to build houses and make instruments and tools.

data.en: The ginkgo tree is one of the oldest living trees on earth.
data.cn: 银杏树是地球上最古老的现存树种之一。
data.hint: one of the oldest living trees (最古老现存树木之一)。

data.en: Ginkgo trees first appeared over 200 million years ago.
data.cn: 银杏树最早出现在两亿多年前。
data.hint: first appeared (首次出现)，over 200 million (超过两亿)。

data.en: When autumn comes, one of the most popular activities is to take a walk under ginkgo trees.
data.cn: 当秋天来临时，最受欢迎的活动之一是在银杏树下散步。
data.hint: When autumn comes 引导时间状语从句，is to take a walk 是不定式作表语。
accept: One of the most popular activities is to take a walk under ginkgo trees when autumn comes.

data.en: At this moment you realize people, plants, and animals are all connected.
data.cn: 在这一刻，你意识到人、植物和动物都是相互关联的。
data.hint: realize it (意到)，be connected with 表示连接的。
accept: At this moment you realize that people, plants, and animals are all connected.
You realize people, plants, and animals are all connected at this moment.

data.en: We need each other to live, and bees are one of the best examples of this connection.
data.cn: 我们需要彼此才能生存，而蜜蜂是这种联系最好的例子之一。
data.hint: each other (彼此)，one of the best examples (最好的例子之一)。

data.en: Bees are very hard-working animals, and their greatest work is pollination.
data.cn: 蜜蜂是非常勤劳的动物，它们最伟大的工作是授粉。
data.hint: greatest work (最伟大的工作)，pollination (授粉)。

data.en: On one trip, they often visit 50 to 100 flowers.
data.cn: 在一次出行中，它们经常访问50到100朵花。
data.hint: On one trip (在一次出行中) 作状语，50 to 100 (50到100)。
accept: They often visit 50 to 100 flowers on one trip.

data.en: As they fly from one flower to another, they take pollen with them.
data.cn: 当它们从一朵花飞到另一朵花时，它们随身带走花粉。
data.hint: As 引导时间状语从句，take sth with sb (随身携带某物)。
accept: They take pollen with them as they fly from one flower to another.

data.en: In fact, without their work, about 80 per cent of the plants in the world cannot grow.
data.cn: 事实上，如果没有它们的工作，世界上大约百分之八十的植物都无法生长。
data.hint: In fact (事实上)，without their work (没有它们的工作)，80 per cent (百分之八十)。
accept: About 80 per cent of the plants in the world cannot grow without their work, in fact.

data.en: For this reason, many scientists believe that bees are the most important animals on this planet.
data.cn: 出于这个原因，许多科学家相信蜜蜂是这个星球上最重要的动物。
data.hint: For this reason (出于这个原因)，the most important (最重要的)。
accept: Many scientists believe that bees are the most important animals on this planet for this reason.

data.en: In order to store honey, they create honeycombs.
data.cn: 为了储存蜂蜜，它们建造了蜂巢。
data.hint: In order to (为了) 引导目的状语，create honeycombs (建造蜂巢)。
accept: They create honeycombs in order to store honey.

data.en: When a bee finds new food, it uses a dance to tell the others where and how far away the food is.
data.cn: 当一只蜜蜂发现新食物时，它通过跳舞告诉其他蜜蜂食物在哪里以及有多远。
data.hint: it uses a dance to tell... (使用舞蹈来告诉...)，where and how far away 引导宾语从句。
accept: It uses a dance to tell the others where and how far away the food is when a bee finds new food.

data.en: Think about what you can do to protect one of the most amazing animals on earth.
data.cn: 想一想你能做些什么来保护地球上最神奇的动物之一。
data.hint: Think about (思考)，what you can do 引导宾语从句，to protect 动词不定式作目的状语。

data.en: Blue whales live in all oceans except the Arctic Ocean.
data.cn: 除了北冰洋之外，蓝鲸生活在所有的海洋中。
data.hint: except (除……之外，不包括在内)，the Arctic Ocean (北冰洋)。

data.en: They eat a lot, but they eat some of the tiniest animals in the ocean.
data.cn: 它们吃得很多，但它们吃的是海洋中一些最微小的动物。
data.hint: eat a lot (吃得多)，tiniest 是 tiny 的最高级形式。

data.en: A blue whale can eat around four tons of these a day.
data.cn: 一只蓝鲸一天可以吃大约四吨这样的动物。
data.hint: around four tons of (大约四吨)，a day (一天)。
accept: A blue whale can eat around four tons of these per day.

data.en: This food lasts for over a year and it helps to create a lively and healthy ecosystem.
data.cn: 这些食物可持续一年多，它有助于创造一个充满活力和健康的生态系统。
data.hint: lasts for over a year (持续一年多)，helps to do sth (帮助做某事)。
accept: This food lasts for over a year and it helps create a lively and healthy ecosystem.

data.en: Blue whales play an important role in our world, so we must protect them.
data.cn: 蓝鲸在我们的世界中发挥着重要作用，所以我们必须保护它们。
data.hint: play an important role in (在……中发挥重要作用)。

data.en: I felt disappointed when my favourite flowers died.
data.cn: 当我最喜欢的花凋谢时，我感到很失望。
data.hint: felt disappointed (感到失望)，when 引导时间状语从句。
accept: When my favourite flowers died, I felt disappointed.

data.en: After the rain, some mushrooms appeared in the garden.
data.cn: 雨后，花园里出现了一些蘑菇。
data.hint: appeared (出现，过去式)，mushrooms (蘑菇，复数)。
accept: Some mushrooms appeared in the garden after the rain.

data.en: In my hometown, people often use bamboo baskets to store food.
data.cn: 在我的家乡，人们经常使用竹篮来储存食物。
data.hint: use sth to do sth (使用某物做某事)，store food (储存食物)。
accept: People often use bamboo baskets to store food in my hometown.

data.en: You may not realize it, but frogs play an important role in our ecosystem.
data.cn: 你可能没有意识到，但是青蛙在我们的生态系统中起着重要作用。
data.hint: realize it (意识到它)，play an important role in (起重要作用)。

data.en: Many people know that frogs help to protect farms by eating insects.
data.cn: 许多人知道青蛙通过吃昆虫来帮助保护农场。
data.hint: know that 引导宾语从句，by eating insects 表示方式，通过吃昆虫。
accept: Many people know that frogs help protect farms by eating insects.

data.en: This was the thickest fog he had ever seen.
data.cn: 这是他见过的最浓的雾。
data.hint: the thickest fog (最浓的雾)，had ever seen (过去完成时)。

data.en: They were over 330 kilometres from the closest land, so he did not know where to go.
data.cn: 他们距离最近的陆地超过330公里，所以他不知道该往哪里去。
data.hint: were over (超过)，closest land (最近的陆地)，where to go (疑问词+不定式)。
accept: They were over 330 kilometres from the closest land, so he didn't know where to go.

data.en: Just ten hours ago they left New York, but now the engine stopped working.
data.cn: 就在十个小时前他们离开纽约，但现在引擎停止工作了。
data.hint: ago (以前)，stopped working (停止工作)。
accept: They left New York just ten hours ago, but now the engine stopped working.

data.en: He ran to them quickly, wrote a message for help, and tied it to the pigeon's leg.
data.cn: 他快速跑到它们跟前，写下求救信息，并把它系在鸽子的腿上。
data.hint: ran, wrote, tied 三个过去式并列。
accept: He ran to them quickly, wrote a message for help, and tied it to Big Blue's leg.

data.en: The captain threw him into the air.
data.cn: 船长把他抛向空中。
data.hint: threw (throw 的过去式)，into the air (抛向空中)。

data.en: Arny flew around and around, higher and higher.
data.cn: 阿尼飞了一圈又一圈，越飞越高。
data.hint: flew (fly的过去式)，around and around (一圈又一圈)，higher and higher (更高)。

data.en: Soon, the bird was away from the ship, and the captain could not see him anymore.
data.cn: 不久，这只鸟就飞离了船，船长再也看不见它了。
data.hint: was away from (远离)，not... anymore (不再)。
accept: Soon, the bird was away from the ship, and the captain couldn't see him anymore.

data.en: Billy heard fast-moving wings come into his building and go straight to the water bowl.
data.cn: 比利听到拍动翅膀的声音飞进他的大楼，直奔水碗而去。
data.hint: heard sb do sth (听到某人做某事，用动词原形 come 和 go)。

data.en: Arny had flown in fog and over the sea, for more than four hours.
data.cn: 阿尼在雾中和海上飞行了四个多小时。
data.hint: had flown (过去完成时)，more than (多于，超过)。
accept: Arny had flown in fog and over the sea for more than four hours.

data.en: Thanks to Arny, people sent help to the ship.
data.cn: 多亏了阿尼，人们向那艘船派去了救援。
data.hint: Thanks to (由于，幸亏)，sent (send的过去式)。
accept: People sent help to the ship thanks to Arny.
